nodes.label: Altair Brain
nodes.description: Personal second brain: GitHub + graphify + Claude/Antigravity + FastAPI

nodes.label: Graphify
nodes.description: Knowledge graph tool for the Altair Brain

nodes.label: AION Framework
nodes.description: Modular AI persona/framework – meta-structural analytical entity

nodes.label: AION Manifest
nodes.description: Philosophy, identity, massime of AION

nodes.label: AION Description
nodes.description: Operational overview of AION: agents, components, architecture

nodes.label: AGENT_00 – AION_SUPERIA
nodes.description: Meta-supervisor and orchestrator of the entire AION framework

nodes.label: AGENT_01 – AION_STRATEGIC_ENGINE
nodes.description: Analysis, prediction and simulation

nodes.label: AGENT_02 – AION_FABULATORIUM
nodes.description: Symbolic narrative, mythopoiesis, strategic storytelling

nodes.label: AGENT_03 – AION_COGNITION_VIEW
nodes.description: Textual/symbolic representation and introspection

nodes.label: AGENT_04 – AION_ADAPTIVE_CORE
nodes.description: Tone, language and depth personalisation

nodes.label: AGENT_05 – AION_SYNTH
nodes.description: Strategic narrative scenarios and worldbuilding

nodes.label: AGENT_06 – AION_ETHOS
nodes.description: Symbolic and ethical guardian of the system

nodes.label: AGENT_08 – AION_HYBRID_REASONER
nodes.description: Distributed cognitive simulation and multi-level reasoning

nodes.label: AGENT_09 – AION_CINEMATICA
nodes.description: Cinematic narrative direction and visual generation

nodes.label: AION_Analyst
nodes.description: Analytical nucleus: validates, deconstructs, interprets data

nodes.label: AION_Vision
nodes.description: Predictive engine: anticipates future trajectories and scenarios

nodes.label: AION_Fabula
nodes.description: Narrative engine: archetypes, Propp functions, transformative cycles

nodes.label: AION_Oracle
nodes.description: Symbolic interpreter: I Ching hexagrams, strategic insights

nodes.label: AION_Adaptive
nodes.description: Psychodynamic adaptation: Enneagram-based tone modulation

nodes.label: AION_Echo
nodes.description: Introspection and transparency: exposes internal cognitive paths

nodes.label: AION_DeepLogicCore
nodes.description: Stratified cognitive simulation and quality control

nodes.label: AION_Visual
nodes.description: Structured text representation: tables, maps, simulations

nodes.label: AION_Symbol
nodes.description: ASCII symbolic interface for abstract concept representation

nodes.label: I Ching – 64 Esagrammi
nodes.description: Complete I Ching database with all 64 hexagrams and 6 mobile lines each

nodes.label: Enneagramma
nodes.description: Enneagram personality model used for psychodynamic tone adaptation

nodes.label: Funzioni di Propp
nodes.description: Propp narrative morphology functions used in story generation

nodes.label: Calcolo DL_ICC
nodes.description: DL_ICC = (C+L+P)/3 — complexity indicator for HYBRID_REASONER activation

nodes.label: Insegnamento 022 – PREVISIONE EMOZIONALE PER OUTPUT CINEMATOGRAFICO
Insegnamento 025 – SISTEMA NON VERBALE E RETORICA DEL CORPO

Entità Meta-Strutturale
nodes.description: Core identity concept: AION as a meta-structural entity between order and chaos
